setting.note: Balzac’s Paris of 1819, climbed one address at a time: the shabby Maison Vauquer boarding house on the Left Bank, and the faubourg Saint-Germain where Rastignac learns what he wants. Balzac maps the whole social ladder onto real streets, and it brings the founder of the realist novel into the atlas.
